ReplaceableSquare.name: Replaceable Square
ReplaceableSquare.description: The first marker placed can be replaced by the other player's marker

DivisionSquare.name: Division Square
DivisionSquare.description: Replicates itself onto one adjacent square, focus bonus squares

BurningSquare.name: Burning Square
BurningSquare.description: Burns one random square and destoys its marker

MoneySquare.name: Money Square
MoneySquare.description: Gives the player a random amount of money between 1 and 10

InterestSquare.name: Interest Square
InterestSquare.description: Gives 10% of total money if a marker is placed on it at the end of the round

ItemSquare.name: Item Square
ItemSquare.description: Gives one random square to the player

FirstSquare.name: First Square
FirstSquare.description: The player with a marker on it plays first, unless multiple players activate this square

ChainSquare.name: Chain Square
ChainSquare.description: Links to one player, who will be the only one able to place markers on it

JailSquare.name: Jail Square
JailSquare.description: Creates one linked Chain Square but lose 5$ minimum or 10% of balance at the end of the round

TeleportSquare.name: Teleporter
TeleportSquare.description: Teleport the marker on a random case with no marker

ModifySideSquare.name: Ying Yang
ModifySideSquare.description: Create a random square is the side square is a default square else delete its effect

DeathSquare.name: Death Square
DeathSquare.description: Kills all markers of one random player

CreeperSquare.name: Creeper Square
CreeperSquare.description: Explodes, destroying itself and all surrounding squares

DiamondSquare.name: The Gem
DiamondSquare.description: Doubles money if balance is below 20$ else gives 20$. Grants 10% interest at the end of the round

LuckySquare.name: Lucky Clover
LuckySquare.description: 50% chance to give a legendary square. 50% chance to receive this square as a negative item at the end of the round

StoneSquare.name: The Rock
StoneSquare.description: Block permenently any square, destroy if all squares are rocks
